palm.title: Palm Reading
palm.subtitle: Upload a photo of your palm for a classical Chinese palmistry analysis

form.uploadText: Click or drag a photo here
form.helperLines: Make sure your palm lines are clearly visible
form.helperHand: Traditionally: gentlemen offer the left palm (男左), ladies the right (女右)
form.leftHand: Left Hand · 左手 (先天手 · 男左)
form.rightHand: Right Hand · 右手 (先天手 · 女右)
form.handHelper: In classical palmistry, the dominant hand reflects your innate fate: gentlemen read the left palm (男左), ladies read the right palm (女右). The other hand shows acquired changes.
form.question: What would you like to know? (optional)
form.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What does my career line say?
form.consent: I understand that my palm photo will be processed to generate this reading and will be immediately deleted afterward. The image is never stored on disk or shared with third parties.

meta.title: Palm Reading | Chinese Culture Studio
meta.description: Upload a photo of your palm and receive an AI-powered analysis based on classical Chinese palmistry. Your image is processed in memory and never stored. Pay what you want (min $1).
meta.ogDescription: AI-powered palm reading based on classical Chinese palmistry. Privacy-first — images never stored. Pay what you want.
meta.twitterDescription: AI palm reading from classical Chinese texts. Zero persistence, full privacy. Pay what you want.

success.waitSubtitle: This usually takes a few seconds.
success.missingId: Missing reference ID. Please try again.
success.timeoutBody: Your payment has been received, but the result is taking longer than expected to prepare.
success.timeoutDetail: This can happen when PayPal's notification is delayed. Your payment and reading are safe.
success.timeoutFooter: If the result doesn't appear within 10 minutes, please contact support with your reference ID.
success.failedBody: Processing failed. Your contribution is safe — contact support for assistance.
success.freeLast: That was your last free reading
success.freeText: Each personalized reading requires computation based on classical texts and traditional methods. Future readings are supported with a $1 contribution.
